name: What's workers comp vs suing after work ladder fall?

mainEntity.name: What's workers comp vs suing after work ladder fall?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp: easy limited; suit: harder fuller damages.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Comp: no-fault medical/wages, quick but limited; suing: fault-based, includes pain but harder proof.[2]

Comp first, then third-party for extras like against GC.[1][3]

| Aspect | Workers' Comp | Lawsuit |
|--------|---------------|---------|
| Fault | No | Yes |
| Damages | Bills, partial wages | Full + pain |
| Time | Fast | Years |

Pursue both; lawyer coordinates.[2]

description: Comp: easy limited; suit: harder fuller damages.[2]
